# config

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN ‚Äî do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Config UI for the config backup source. Backs up Singularity config files into the backup archive.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `ConfigV2.WebRegister`
  - Uses: `config_v2.ConfigV2`
- Server:
  - Uses: `backup.BackupSource`, `config_v2.ConfigV2`, `config_v2.getConfig`, `infra/paths.SINGULARITY_DIR`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
